samples.code:
def fast_sort(arr):
    if len(arr) <= 1:
        return arr[:]
    if len(arr) <= 20:
        result = arr[:]
        for i in range(1, len(result)):
            key = result[i]
            j = i - 1
            while j >= 0 and result[j] > key:
                result[j + 1] = result[j]
                j -= 1
            result[j + 1] = key
        return result
    mid = len(arr) // 2
    left = fast_sort(arr[:mid])
    right = fast_sort(arr[mid:])
    merged = []
    i = j = 0
    while i < len(left) and j < len(right):
        if left[i] <= right[j]:
            merged.append(left[i])
            i += 1
        else:
            merged.append(right[j])
            j += 1
    merged.extend(left[i:])
    merged.extend(right[j:])
    return merged
